The '''Yinchorri Council of Elders''' was the ruling body of [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] in [[Tol-Kachorn]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] and were made up of the Yinchorri [[Intelligentsia (Yinchorr)|intelligentsia]] caste. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] held the council hostage in exchange for [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who had been on planet. The Yinchorri then rebelled against the Empire and all of the council members were killed, followed by the destruction of Tol Kashorn.
